description: REQ-FEED-014 'DESIGN.md 準拠要件' explicitly mandates the banner container show 'Deep Shadow 5-layer, #dd5b00 左アクセントボーダー'. Implementation uses (a) a full 1px solid border-around (border: 1px solid rgba(221, 91, 0, 0.3)) instead of a left-accent only border, and (b) a 4-layer box-shadow (4 commas) instead of the required 5-layer. Both DESIGN.md token contracts are unmet for the failure surface, weakening the visual distinction between informational vs error banners.
recommendation: Replace the all-around border with 'border-left: 4px solid #dd5b00' (and remove the surrounding border or set it to whisper border rgba(0,0,0,0.1)); replace the 4-layer shadow with the DESIGN.md 5-layer Deep Shadow token used by DeleteConfirmModal.svelte:115. Add a grep audit assertion enforcing 'border-left' presence and a 5-comma box-shadow.
